allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process ''Docker Desktop'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
# Crear directorio para cloudflared
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path ''C:\cloudflared'' | Out-Null

# Descargar cloudflared
Write-Host ''Descargando cloudflared...''
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-windows-amd64.exe'' -OutFile ''C:\cloudflared\cloudflared.exe''

# Verificar descarga
if (Test-Path ''C:\cloudflared\cloudflared.exe'') {
    Write-Host ''cloudflared descargado exitosamente''
    C:\cloudflared\cloudflared.exe --version
} else {
    Write-Host ''Error al descargar cloudflared''
    exit 1
}
")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList ''-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command ""C:\cloudflared\cloudflared.exe service install eyJhIjoiMGFjMTk5MDJmNzE1NGNkNzRjYjFhM2Y5NTU0YWY0N2EiLCJ0IjoiMWU1ZDM0OTQtYjBjZi00OTNkLWFjZWItMTIzOWNiMDdkYTBkIiwicyI6Ik0yRTVaVE16TkRNdFlqVXpOQzAwTVdZekxXSTNOVE10TmpSbU1EbGlZekJsWmpkaiJ9""'' -Verb RunAs -Wait")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Service -Name cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Status, DisplayName")
Bash(for service in progress translation trainingProfile quiz token)

Bash(for file in src/__tests__/middleware/errorHandler.test.ts src/__tests__/middleware/logger.test.ts src/__tests__/middleware/optionalAuth.test.ts src/__tests__/middleware/validate.test.ts src/__tests__/auth/password-reset.test.ts src/__tests__/regression/smoke-tests.test.ts __tests__/auth/login.test.ts __tests__/auth/register.test.ts __tests__/middleware/authenticate.test.ts __tests__/users/rbac.test.ts)
